rss.channel: 梓瑶233 https://blog.ziyao.cc/ Blog posts zh-cn $===$ local gen = function(s) table.insert(tpl.result,s); return; end for _,article in ipairs(tpl.arg) do local s = string.format([[ %s https://blog.ziyao.cc/%s Read full version. %s ziyao-blog-%s ]], article.title, article.name .. ".html", article.name .. ".html", os.date("%d %b %Y %T %z", article.date), article.name); gen(s); end $===$
